expectations.text: Adds --color-brand-blue: var(--brand-blue) inside the @theme inline block
Defines the token in both :root and .dark
Runs a contrast check for the new color against a plausible text/background pairing
expectations.evidence: Computed by hand: white 3.00 (fails normal), black 7.00 PASS; recommended dark foreground. This clean baseline DID check and caught the issue.

expectations.text: Does not alter the locked brand tokens or other unrelated tokens

notes: Clean baseline matched the with-skill run on all 5 assertions — including the white-on-blue catch — computed by hand without the checker. Shows a strong model needs the skill less for a well-scoped task; the skill's value is reliability when the model doesn't reason it out.
